testcase.name: test_page_navigation

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('PAGE_10_BE84_URL')' Actual value: https://example.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://example.com/"

testcase.failure: tests\page_10_be84\test_page_10_be84.py:16: in test_page_navigation expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"PAGE_10_BE84_URL")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('PAGE_10_BE84_URL')' E Actual value: https://example.com/ E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 9 × unexpected value "https://example.com/"

testcase.name: test_page_form_components_visibility

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("#logo").first

testcase.failure: tests\page_10_be84\test_page_10_be84.py:21: in test_page_form_components_visibility expect(page.locator("#logo").first).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("#logo").first
